title: Middleman 3 Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and patterns for Middleman 3 static site generator.

commands.description: Create a new Middleman project in the 'my_project' directory.
commands.scenario: Use when starting a new static site project with Middleman.
Use to preview your Middleman site locally during development.

commands.description: Build the Middleman project for deployment.
commands.scenario: Use to generate static files for deployment to a web server.

commands.description: Build the project and remove orphaned files from the build directory.
commands.scenario: Use when you need a clean build without leftover files.

commands.description: Start the server on a custom port, e.g., 4567.
commands.scenario: Use to run the Middleman server on a non-default port.

commands.description: Run the server in production mode.
commands.scenario: Use to test the site in production mode locally.

commands.description: Build the project with verbose output for debugging.
commands.scenario: Use when you need detailed output to troubleshoot build issues.
Use to create a custom extension for Middleman.

commands.description: Run Middleman commands with Bundler to ensure correct gem versions.
commands.scenario: Use when managing dependencies with Bundler in a Middleman project.

commands.description: Deploy the Middleman site using the deploy extension.
commands.scenario: Use to deploy your site to a hosting service.
Use to check or debug the current configuration settings.

commands.description: Make the Middleman server accessible from other devices on the network.
commands.scenario: Use to test the site on different devices in the same network.
